product_overview: HTTP API to manage participants, workshops and enrollments (including waitlist and cancellation), providing endpoints for creating participants and workshops, enrolling/cancelling participants, and retrieving workshop details and summaries.
core_goals: Provide a minimal, reliable API to create and manage participants, workshops and enrollments.
Expose workshop details including enrollment summary and attendee list for operational visibility.
Support waitlist behavior and cancellation flows to maintain accurate workshop capacity state.
Validate inputs and return appropriate HTTP error codes for client guidance.
Keep the API simple and stateless to enable easy integration and testing (no auth present in current scope).

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Endpoint to verify API liveness and basic health status.
user_flows: GET /health -> Receive non-200 (e.g. 503) indicating degraded/unhealthy service

features.name: Participant Management
features.description: Create participants who can enroll in workshops.
user_flows: POST /api/participants with body {name: 'Ana Costa', email: 'ana@example.com'} -> Receive 201 with participant object {id, name, email, createdAt}
POST /api/participants with body missing required fields (e.g. no email) -> Receive 400 ValidationErrorResponse
POST /api/participants with body using an email that already exists -> Receive 409 ErrorResponse with message indicating duplicate email

features.name: Workshop Management
features.description: Create workshops and retrieve workshop details including enrollment summary and attendee list.
user_flows: POST /api/workshops with body {title, description, capacity, scheduledAt} -> Receive 201 with workshop object {id, title, description, capacity, scheduledAt, createdAt}
POST /api/workshops with invalid payload (missing fields or malformed scheduledAt) -> Receive 400 ValidationErrorResponse
POST /api/workshops with business-invalid data (e.g. capacity < 1 or scheduling conflict) -> Receive 422 ErrorResponse
GET /api/workshops/:id with valid id -> Receive 200 with WorkshopDetails {id, title, description, capacity, scheduledAt, summary, enrollments}
GET /api/workshops/:id with non-existent id -> Receive 404 ErrorResponse

features.name: Enrollment Management
features.description: Enroll participants in workshops, place overflow on waitlist, and cancel enrollments; query workshop to observe enrollment summary.
user_flows: POST /api/enrollments with body {participantId, workshopId} (when workshop has available capacity) -> Receive 201 Enrollment with status: CONFIRMED
POST /api/enrollments with body {participantId, workshopId} (when workshop is full) -> Receive 201 Enrollment with status: WAITLIST
POST /api/enrollments with missing/invalid body -> Receive 400 ValidationErrorResponse
POST /api/enrollments with participantId or workshopId that do not exist -> Receive 404 ErrorResponse
POST /api/enrollments when participant is already enrolled in the same workshop -> Receive 409 ErrorResponse

PATCH /api/enrollments/:id/cancel with valid enrollment id -> Receive 200 CancelEnrollmentResponse {message} -> GET /api/workshops/:id -> Receive 200 with updated WorkshopDetails (summary and enrollments reflect cancellation and any waitlist promotion)
PATCH /api/enrollments/:id/cancel with non-existent enrollment id -> Receive 404 ErrorResponse

features.name: Workshop Booking API
features.description: Endpoints for participant creation, workshop creation, enrollments, and workshop details retrieval.

endpoints.description: Retrieve workshop details with enrollment summary and attendee list
Enroll an existing participant in a workshop

known_limitations.issue: No authentication or authorization on API endpoints
